code_action.new_content:
# XYZ

## The Code That Never Sleeps

(Verse 1)
In the quiet of the midnight hour
When the world outside is fast asleep
I'm staring at a glowing screen
Where promises are mine to keep

Lines of code dance in the light
Bugs and features in a fight
Another deadline drawing near
Pushing back the doubt and fear

(Chorus)
Oh, the code that never sleeps
It runs through all my dreams
In loops and functions deep
The logic flows and streams

From morning light to evening dark
It's always there, a constant spark
The code that never sleeps
It's the rhythm that my heart keeps

(Verse 2)
Coffee cups stack up beside
As I chase the bugs to hide
Every merge, every commit
Another small piece of it

The terminal glows with green and red
As I fix what others said
Through documentation long and vast
Building futures meant to last

(Chorus)
Oh, the code that never sleeps
It runs through all my dreams
In loops and functions deep
The logic flows and streams

From morning light to evening dark
It's always there, a constant spark
The code that never sleeps
It's the rhythm that my heart keeps

(Bridge)
Some people count sheep when they lie down
I count semicolons all around
Every if statement, every case
Dancing through this digital space

The world may change and years may pass
But this art is built to last
In zeros and in ones we trust
Turning algorithms into dust

(Chorus)
Oh, the code that never sleeps
It runs through all my dreams
In loops and functions deep
The logic flows and streams

From morning light to evening dark
It's always there, a constant spark
The code that never sleeps
It's the rhythm that my heart keeps

(Outro)
The code that never sleeps...
Never sleeps...
In the silence, it still speaks...
The code that never sleeps.

planner_response.response: I've written a song called "The Code That Never Sleeps" in your xyz.md file. It's a programmer's anthem about the endless cycle of coding, debugging, and the passion that drives developers through late nights and early mornings.

code_action.new_content:
# XYZ

## Digital Dreams

(Verse 1)
Midnight glow on my face
Lost in this endless space
Fingers dance across the keys
Building worlds among the trees

Binary rivers start to flow
Where the brilliant ideas grow
Every line a piece of art
From the bottom of my heart

(Chorus)
We're the architects of dawn
Writing code from dusk till dawn
In this digital frontier
We make the impossible clear

Through the bugs and through the breaks
For every chance that we must take
We're the dreamers in the machine
Building futures yet unseen

(Verse 2)
Coffee fuels the fire bright
Through the long and lonely night
Every error, every fix
Makes us stronger, makes us click

Version control, our steady guide
Through the changes deep and wide
Pull requests and merge conflicts too
All the things that developers do

(Chorus)
We're the architects of dawn
Writing code from dusk till dawn
In this digital frontier
We make the impossible clear

Through the bugs and through the breaks
For every chance that we must take
We're the dreamers in the machine
Building futures yet unseen

(Bridge)
Some see screens, we see possibility
Some see text, we see reality
Every function, every class
Building futures meant to last

In this world of pure creation
We find our true vocation
Turning thoughts into living code
Lighting up the digital road

(Chorus)
We're the architects of dawn
Writing code from dusk till dawn
In this digital frontier
We make the impossible clear

Through the bugs and through the breaks
For every chance that we must take
We're the dreamers in the machine
Building futures yet unseen

(Outro)
Digital dreams...
In glowing streams...
We're building what tomorrow means...
Digital dreams...
